metadata.description: Configuration file for PLSR-based feature selection for thermodynamic property prediction
metadata.author: Materials Discovery Lab
metadata.application: Multi-property prediction: Θ_D, C_p, α, κ, and other thermodynamic/transport properties

n_components.description: Number of PLS components to extract
n_components.recommendation: Start with 5; increase if cumulative R² < 0.85

loading_threshold.description: Minimum absolute loading value for feature retention (|L| > threshold)
loading_threshold.recommendation: 0.10 balances feature sparsity and predictive power

incremental_r2_threshold.description: Minimum incremental R² contribution for component significance (ΔR² > threshold)
incremental_r2_threshold.recommendation: 0.05 ensures only meaningful components are retained

scale_features.recommendation: Always true for PLSR to ensure equal feature weighting

max_iter.description: Maximum iterations for NIPALS algorithm convergence
max_iter.recommendation: Start with [500, 1000]; increase if convergence warnings occur

tol.recommendation: 1e-8 for high precision; 1e-6 for faster convergence

scoring_metrics.recommendation: Refit on RMSE to minimize prediction errors

n_jobs.description: Number of parallel jobs (-1 uses all CPU cores)

random_state.recommendation: Keep fixed for consistent results across runs

debye_temperature.notes: Debye temperature strongly correlates with elastic moduli and density

heat_capacity.notes: Heat capacity depends on number of atoms (Dulong-Petit) and bonding character

thermal_expansion.notes: Thermal expansion requires Grüneisen parameter for anharmonicity

thermal_conductivity.notes: Thermal conductivity depends on phonon scattering (γ), stiffness, and complexity

acoustic_debye_temperature.notes: Acoustic Debye temperature focuses on low-frequency phonon modes

columns_to_drop.description: Non-numerical columns that must be removed before PLSR training
columns_to_drop.reason: These are string identifiers with no numerical meaning for regression

data_quality_checks.description: Quality control parameters for data validation

feature_engineering.description: Advanced feature engineering options (use with caution)

critical_warnings: ⚠️ Features must be standardized (StandardScaler) for valid loadings
⚠️ Ensure target property has no missing values
⚠️ Check for multicollinearity (VIF) in selected features
best_practices: ✓ Start with default parameters, then fine-tune
✓ Validate on independent test set (80/20 split)
✓ Compare PLSR results with correlation analysis

references.plsr_theory: Wold, S. et al. (2001). PLS-regression: a basic tool of chemometrics. Chemometrics and Intelligent Laboratory Systems, 58(2), 109-130.
references.feature_selection: Mehmood, T. et al. (2012). A review of variable selection methods in Partial Least Squares Regression. Chemometrics and Intelligent Laboratory Systems, 118, 62-69.
references.cross_validation: Kohavi, R. (1995). A study of cross-validation and bootstrap for accuracy estimation and model selection. IJCAI, 14(2), 1137-1145.
